name: OneMain Financial
description_short: At 8600 Lasalle Rd ste 400, Towson, MD 21286, OneMain Financial can be reached at 1-410-823-3200.
description_long:
OneMain Financial has served consumers for over 100 years and operates a nationwide network of branches, including locations like their W Flagler St branch in Miami, FL. The company specializes in personal lending for a wide range of life events and financial needs, positioning itself as an accessible alternative for borrowers seeking structured, transparent loan products. They offer both secured and unsecured personal loans with fixed interest rates and fixed monthly payments, eliminating payment surprises.

The company's core offerings include personal loans ranging from $1,500 to $30,000 with loan terms between 24 and 60 months. Fixed APR rates span from 11.99% to 35.99%, depending on creditworthiness and loan structure. OneMain advertises same-day funding through their SpeedFunds program (as quickly as 1 hour after closing for eligible debit card holders). Loan purposes include debt consolidation, auto purchases and refinancing, medical bills, home improvement, emergency expenses, and various lifestyle purchases (vacations, weddings, etc.). Customers can apply online, by phone, or in-branch, with prequalification available without affecting credit scores.

OneMain distinguishes itself through local branch presence, after-hours appointment availability, and transparent fixed-rate terms with no prepayment penalties. Their 100+ year history and emphasis on one-on-one assistance from loan specialists appeals to borrowers who prefer in-person guidance. The SpeedFunds same-day funding option and broad loan purpose flexibility also set them apart in the personal loan market. They clearly outline required documentation (proof of identity, residence, and income) before closing.

However, the advertised APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is substantially higher than rates from many credit unions and online lenders, especially for borrowers with good credit. The $1,500 minimum loan amount excludes consumers needing smaller emergency amounts. The company's reliance on branch locations may limit accessibility for some consumers, though online and phone options are available. Approval and funding speed, while marketed as same-day, depends on closing time and bank processing.
pros: Fixed rates, fixed payments, and no prepayment penalties provide budget predictability
Same-day funding available within 1 hour of closing via SpeedFunds for eligible debit cardholders
Prequalification process does not affect credit score
Wide range of loan purposes explicitly supported (debt consolidation, auto, medical, home improvement, etc.)
After-hours appointments available to accommodate working customers
Secured and unsecured loan options available
Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 with flexible 24–60 month terms
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is significantly higher than rates from credit unions and online lenders
$1,500 minimum loan amount excludes consumers needing small emergency funds under $1,500
Actual approval rates and final APR depend on credit profile and collateral; advertised rates may not be available to all applicants
Branch-dependent service model limits accessibility compared to fully online lenders
Documentation requirements (proof of income, residence, identity) may slow approval for some applicants
best_for: Borrowers with fair-to-poor credit seeking structured personal loans with predictable payments
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance and local branch support for loan decisions
Individuals needing debt consolidation, auto financing, or home improvement funding between $1,500–$30,000
Customers who value transparent fixed-rate terms and want to avoid prepayment penalties
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit or limited lending history who value transparent terms, fixed payments, and local branch support—but the 11.99%–35.99% APR range makes them significantly more expensive than credit unions or online lenders, and the $1,500 minimum excludes small emergency borrowing needs.
services: Phone-based loan applications and specialist consultations
